skills.name: spec-to-code-drift-detector
skills.summary: Detects divergence between approved specifications and current repository behavior.

skills.name: code-to-spec-reconciliation
skills.summary: Proposes controlled specification updates when valid repository behavior is not represented upstream.

skills.name: manual-edit-preservation
skills.summary: Preserves manual edits across regeneration using ownership, protected regions, semantic identity, and version history.

skills.name: incremental-regeneration-planner
skills.summary: Creates the smallest safe regeneration plan for an approved change request.

skills.name: change-set-impact-analyzer
skills.summary: Analyzes proposed repository changes across behavior, contracts, data, security, operations, and cost.

skills.name: architecture-drift-detector
skills.summary: Detects repository structures and runtime topology that violate the approved architecture baseline.

skills.name: database-api-compatibility-check
skills.summary: Checks schema, migration, REST, RPC, event, and webhook compatibility for a change set.

skills.name: refactoring-and-upgrade-bridge
skills.summary: Plans controlled framework, runtime, dependency, and structural upgrades within Project Synthesis.

skills.name: human-approval-gate
skills.summary: Manages scoped approvals for high-impact change, reconciliation, repair, security, data, and delivery decisions.

skills.name: git-pr-delivery-manager
skills.summary: Packages approved incremental changes into reviewable commits and pull or merge requests.

skills.name: synthesis-agent-orchestrator
skills.summary: Coordinates specialist agents, skills, tools, approvals, budgets, and state transitions for Project Synthesis.

skills.name: planner-coder-reviewer-agent-team
skills.summary: Defines separated planner, implementer, reviewer, tester, security, and certifier responsibilities.

skills.name: skill-discovery-and-routing
skills.summary: Discovers and ranks Skills by contract compatibility, capability, policy, language, domain, and evidence quality.

skills.name: skill-input-output-contract-validator
skills.summary: Validates Skill manifests, schemas, preconditions, outputs, evidence, and version compatibility.

skills.name: skill-sandbox-permission-enforcer
skills.summary: Enforces process, filesystem, network, repository, secret, deployment, and data capabilities for Skills and agents.

skills.name: model-routing-and-budget-controller
skills.summary: Routes tasks across models and controls token, latency, monetary, and retry budgets.

skills.name: context-pack-builder
skills.summary: Builds minimal, source-grounded context packs for each specialist agent.

skills.name: domain-pack-sdk
skills.summary: Defines packaging, extension, validation, testing, and publication contracts for Domain Packs.

skills.name: template-skill-marketplace-publisher
skills.summary: Publishes governed Skills, templates, profiles, and Domain Packs into an internal or external marketplace.

skills.name: skill-version-compatibility-manager
skills.summary: Manages Skill, schema, template, model adapter, and Domain Pack compatibility across platform releases.

skills.name: golden-project-benchmark-suite
skills.summary: Defines representative benchmark projects across languages, architectures, and risk levels.

skills.name: requirements-understanding-eval
skills.summary: Evaluates extraction, ambiguity handling, scope, conflict detection, assumptions, and acceptance criteria.

skills.name: architecture-quality-eval
skills.summary: Evaluates architecture simplicity, fit, boundaries, tradeoffs, security, data ownership, and operability.

skills.name: code-correctness-eval
skills.summary: Evaluates semantic correctness, maintainability, contract conformance, language idioms, and generated-code governance.

skills.name: build-run-success-eval
skills.summary: Evaluates clean setup, build, migration, startup, health, smoke, shutdown, and evidence reproducibility.

skills.name: security-compliance-eval
skills.summary: Evaluates threat controls, authorization, tenant isolation, supply chain, secrets, data handling, and compliance evidence.

skills.name: traceability-completeness-eval
skills.summary: Evaluates end-to-end lineage from source requirements through code, tests, evidence, releases, and change history.

skills.name: regeneration-safety-eval
skills.summary: Evaluates idempotency, incremental scope, manual-edit preservation, merge behavior, and regression safety.

skills.name: cross-language-parity-eval
skills.summary: Compares Java, Python, and .NET implementations of the same approved specification.

skills.name: large-project-scalability-eval
skills.summary: Evaluates performance and reliability of synthesis on large repositories, specifications, graphs, and change sets.

skills.name: failure-recovery-chaos-eval
skills.summary: Evaluates recovery from model, tool, runner, network, registry, storage, broker, and approval interruptions.

skills.name: project-synthesis-product-certification
skills.summary: Combines benchmark and policy evidence into a versioned product certification decision.
